title: Portfolio Website
description: A responsive single-page portfolio in vanilla JS and Tailwind CSS, with JSON-driven content, deployed on AWS with automated CI/CD.
fullDescription: A responsive single-page application (SPA) built with vanilla JavaScript (ES6+) and Tailwind CSS, featuring client-side routing, JSON-driven content, dynamic project modals, dark/light theme support, and smooth animations with self-hosted Lucide icons. The contact form is powered by the Web3Forms API, so no backend is required. Deployed on AWS using S3 for static hosting and CloudFront for global CDN distribution, with GitHub Actions handling CI/CD that syncs to S3 and invalidates the CloudFront cache on every push to main.

title: Scalable API Platform
description: High-performance REST API built with Laravel Lumen, serving millions of requests with Redis caching and DynamoDB.
fullDescription: A high-performance REST API platform built with Laravel Lumen, designed to handle millions of requests in production environments. The system leverages Redis for caching frequently accessed data, DynamoDB for scalable NoSQL storage, and implements rate limiting, request validation, and comprehensive error handling. Built for public sector applications requiring high availability and security compliance.

title: Data Processing Pipeline
description: Automated data processing system handling large-scale data ingestion, transformation, and analytics for public sector applications.
fullDescription: An automated data processing pipeline designed for large-scale data ingestion, transformation, and analytics in public sector applications. Built on AWS Lambda for serverless execution, S3 for data storage, and custom ETL workflows for data quality checks and transformations. The system processes millions of records with fault-tolerant execution, automatic retry mechanisms, and comprehensive logging for audit compliance.

title: Security Framework
description: Comprehensive security framework implementing authentication, authorization, and audit logging for enterprise applications.
fullDescription: A comprehensive security framework providing authentication, authorization, and audit logging for enterprise-grade applications. Implements JWT-based token authentication, OAuth 2.0 flows for third-party integrations, and role-based access control (RBAC) for fine-grained permissions. Includes session management, brute-force protection, and detailed audit trails for compliance requirements.

title: Monitoring Dashboard
description: Real-time monitoring and alerting system for tracking application performance, system health, and business metrics.
fullDescription: A real-time monitoring and alerting system built for tracking application performance, system health, and business metrics. Uses WebSocket connections for live data streaming, Redis for pub/sub messaging, and Chart.js for interactive data visualization. Features configurable alert thresholds, historical data analysis, and customizable dashboard layouts for different team roles.

title: CI/CD Pipeline
description: Automated deployment pipeline with testing, security scanning, and multi-environment deployment for production applications.
fullDescription: An automated CI/CD pipeline implementing continuous integration and deployment workflows with comprehensive testing, security scanning, and multi-environment deployment strategies. Built with GitHub Actions for orchestration, Docker for containerization, Terraform for infrastructure-as-code, and AWS for cloud deployment. Supports blue-green deployments, automated rollbacks, and environment-specific configurations.
